name: Verify Must-Gather
description: Validate must-gather diagnostic collection works for CAPI/CAPA managed ROSA HCP clusters

playbooks.name: Verify Must-Gather Collection
playbooks.description: Runs must-gather and validates diagnostic data is collected for CAPI/CAPA resources

documentation.overview: This test suite validates that must-gather diagnostic collection works correctly for CAPI/CAPA managed resources. It verifies that CRD data, controller logs, and cluster resources are captured in the must-gather output.
prerequisites: MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured
At least one ROSA HCP cluster provisioned via CAPI (recommended)
oc CLI with adm must-gather support

quick_start.description: Runs must-gather and validates diagnostic output contains CAPI/CAPA data

expected_results: Output directory contains CAPI CRD resources
ROSAControlPlane resources are included when clusters exist
